episodes.title: Ahmedi peace and light cult exposed!!!   Who is Abdullah Hashem part1
episodes.description:
In part one of this series we will look at who Abdullah Hashem is and how he rose to fame before he started his cult.

Strangely there seems to be very little information on Hashrm’s family and childhood but I have pieced together what I can. 
Who is the man behind this new cult the Ahmed religion of peace and light? #ahmedi #crewe #history #expose #egyptian #american #religion #abdullah #beaniehat
subjects: Ahmadi Religion of Peace and Light
